rows.label: tlk45300071_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Unlike Superbia, Acedia has
a pleasant climate and is
very easy to live in.

rows.label: tlk45300071_03_msg0002
rows.name:
I came here for sightseeing,
but perhaps I could even
settle here permanently.

rows.label: tlk45300071_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Surely, in Acedia, a wonderful
encounter may be waiting
for me as well.

rows.label: tlk45300071_03_msg0004
rows.name:
I throw money from the overlook
every day. It would not be
strange if my wish came true, right?
